skills.name: get-space-weather
skills.description: Retrieve real-time space weather data: Kp index, solar wind, X-ray flux, IMF Bz, Dst index, and NOAA alerts.

skills.name: get-kp-forecast
skills.description: Get a 3-hour ML-powered Kp forecast with 95% confidence interval from an LSTM model trained on 20+ years of NOAA data.

skills.name: get-neo
skills.description: Get NASA near-Earth object close approaches for the next 7 days, with miss distance, velocity, diameter, and hazard classification.

skills.name: get-anomalies
skills.description: Get automatically detected space weather anomalies: geomagnetic storms, solar flares, solar wind spikes, asteroid close approaches, and ML forecast alerts.
